title: Himeji,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Himeji, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Himeji is a city in with a population of 530,000. Home to Japan’s most beautiful original castle, a UNESCO World Heritage site, with a charming historic city center.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
